_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Left 4 Dead 2 (ZPH)
author: ilumos@gmail.com

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash

set -o errexit
set -o pipefail

echo_info(){ echo -e "\033[0;32m$*\033[0m"; }
echo_error(){ echo -e "\033[0;31m$*\033[0m" >&2; }
echo_warning(){ echo -e "\033[0;33m$*\033[0m"; }

echo_info "Getting ZPH configs and scripts"
cd /tmp
git clone https://github.com/zeropingheroes/pterodactyl-eggs.git
git clone https://github.com/zeropingheroes/game-servers.git

echo_info "Installing SteamCMD and downloading app"
cd /tmp/pterodactyl-eggs
export STEAMCMD_APPID=222860

echo_info "Working around the SteamCMD '(Missing Configuration') error by downloading content for Windows first"
export STEAMCMD_PLATFORM=windows
/tmp/pterodactyl-eggs/installer-steamcmd.sh

echo_info "Downloading content for Linux"
export STEAMCMD_PLATFORM=linux
/tmp/pterodactyl-eggs/installer-steamcmd.sh

echo_info "Copying ZPH configs into place"
cp -fr /tmp/game-servers/Left4Dead2/configs/* /mnt/server/

echo_info "Installation completed"

variables.name: Server Map
variables.description: The name of the map the server should start with
